pitchLine.speedupOrdersOfMagnitude: Roughly three orders of magnitude faster feedback loop for field triage

microClimateScenarios.label: Behind drywall
microClimateScenarios.narrative: RH uptrend detected through vent gap before staining appeared on face paper.

microClimateScenarios.label: Under sink trap leak
microClimateScenarios.narrative: Localized vapor spike identified while cabinet exterior still looked dry.

microClimateScenarios.label: Uninsulated attic
microClimateScenarios.narrative: Seasonal dew-point crossover flagged prior to sheathing discoloration.

microClimateScenarios.label: Ventilated crawlspace
microClimateScenarios.narrative: Gradient vs upstairs baseline indicated trapped moisture at rim joist.

microClimateScenarios.label: Condensate / HVAC closet
microClimateScenarios.narrative: Intermittent coil cycling produced spikes invisible to spot checks.
